note: I-95 and I-84 used sequential exit numbers for decades, so posted exits do NOT match mileposts; 'mm' is the actual milepost, 'exit' is the posted exit. Connecticut Turnpike/state service plazas (Project Service LLC) have fuel and food but very limited truck parking. TA Willington and the North Stonington stop are the main overnight options in the state.

stops.name: Danbury Welcome Center Rest Area (EB only)
stops.notes: Eastbound only; welcome center just past NY line with truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Southington Service Plazas (both directions)
stops.notes: EB and WB plazas; fuel and fast food, limited truck parking

stops.name: TA Willington
stops.notes: 327 Ruby Rd; largest truck stop in Connecticut, full service, ~200 truck spaces

stops.name: Willington Rest Areas (both directions)
stops.notes: EB and WB; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Middletown Rest Area (SB only)
stops.notes: Southbound; truck parking, no fuel. No truck stops on I-91 in CT

stops.name: Darien Service Plazas (both directions)
stops.notes: NB and SB plazas; fuel and food, very limited truck parking

stops.name: Fairfield Service Plaza (NB only)
stops.notes: Northbound Connecticut Turnpike plaza; fuel and food, very limited truck parking

stops.name: Pilot Travel Center
stops.notes: 433 Old Gate Ln; fuel and parking, tight lot

stops.name: Milford Service Plazas (both directions)
stops.notes: NB and SB plazas; fuel and food, limited truck parking

stops.name: TA New Haven (Branford)
stops.notes: Off Exit 56 (Leetes Island Rd area); full-service TA

stops.name: Branford Service Plaza (NB only)
stops.notes: Northbound; fuel and food, limited truck parking

stops.name: Madison Service Plazas (both directions)
stops.notes: NB and SB plazas; fuel and food, limited truck parking

stops.name: North Stonington Travel Stop
stops.notes: Route 216 at Exit 93; last truck stop before Rhode Island, heavily used since RI has none

stops.name: Montville Service Plaza (SB only)
stops.notes: Southbound Project Service plaza; fuel and food, very limited truck parking; verify current operating status

stops.name: Plainfield Service Plaza
stops.notes: Fuel and food, limited truck parking; verify current operating status
